divergence: The Black Death targeted only the wealthy
story_angle: eyewitness dispatch from the scene with vivid sensory detail
headline: Neural Interface Hack Exposes 2 Million Brain-Linked Users
deck: Victims report vivid memories of a beach they never visited.
article:
Records from the Central Bureau confirm that a neural interface hack has compromised 2 million brain-linked users. The report cites forty-three independent witnesses.

Professor Aldous Crane remarked that this incident highlights underlying tensions often masked by official statements. 'We mapped this possibility in 2075,' they noted. 'No one wanted the map.'

In the docklands, residents described a silence that lasted three minutes. One shopkeeper evaluated the incident through the lens of inventory losses rather than grand narratives.

The Ministry of Continuity issued an 804-word statement that failed to address key questions and introduced five new ones.

Tomorrow's edition will delve into the financial aspects, the motives behind the hack, and the one detail every spokesperson has avoided mentioning.
author: Special Reporter

oped.title: Your Body is a Rental
oped.author: A Ghost in the Machine
oped.body: You do not own your liver. You do not own your eyes. You lease them from a corporation that can repossess them at any time. Read the fine print.

classifieds.text: Elite Security Personnel Needed! Join the ranks of the prestigious Guardian Corp. Protect the ultra-rich against the threats of the neon underbelly. Must have cybernetic enhancements, combat experience, and a flawless track record. Competitive pay, benefits, and access to exclusive nightlife. Apply now through the datasphere – the streets are waiting!

Luxury Holo-therapy sessions available at Ethereal Oasis! Experience cutting-edge emotional restoration designed exclusively for those who survived the Black Death. Immerse in tailored environments & artificial memories crafted to soothe your mind. Limited slots – book your session before they fill up! Payment in crypto accepted.

Opulent downtown lofts for sale! Only for post-Black Death survivors! Experience breathtaking views of the neon skyline in fully automated smart homes. Equipped with AI companions and bio-enhanced security systems. Act fast! These properties are flying off the market, and only the elite can claim them. Contact your wealth manager today!

Introducing the Black Lotus Valet: the exclusive transport service for the privileged! Avoid the chaos of the streets and let us whisk you away in style. Our self-driving, AI-optimized hovercrafts are armed for safety and engineered for speed. Subscribe annually to enjoy unlimited rides across the metropolis. The future of luxury transport is here!

panels.caption: Did you hear about the neural interface hack exposing 2 million users?
I prefer timelines where that sort of thing is impossible.

joke.setup: How do you report on today's headline?
joke.punchline: Very carefully, in an alternate timeline.
joke.text: How do you report on today's headline? Very carefully, in an alternate timeline.

sponsor_ads.headline: Upgrade Your DNA: Live Like the Elite!
sponsor_ads.body: Experience the future of longevity with RevitaGene. Our proprietary treatment repairs your genetic code, making you resistant to the diseases that plague the rich. Don’t just survive—thrive!

sponsor_ads.headline: Safety Above All: SmartBunker Living
sponsor_ads.body: Introducing SmartBunker: the ultimate luxury survival pod. Equipped with AI-enhanced security systems and bio-decontamination features, ensure your safety from the outside world’s dangers while enjoying an opulent lifestyle.

sponsor_ads.headline: Black Market Antidotes: When Only the Best Will Do
sponsor_ads.body: For those who dare to defy fate, our exclusive line of black market antidotes guarantees protection against the latest elite-targeted pathogens. Secure your health and status today—because wealth is nothing without life.
